user.title: MCONNECT
user.description: Click the link to authenticate with your MCONNECT account. You can use email, Google, Facebook, or Apple.

auth.title: Waiting for authentication
auth.description: Complete the login on the MCONNECT website and select your home.

finish.title: Configured
finish.description: Your MCONNECT home has been configured successfully.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate MCONNECT
reauth_confirm.description: Your MCONNECT session has expired. Click the link to authenticate again.

abort.token_limit_reached: Maximum number of personal access tokens reached. Please revoke an existing token in your MCONNECT account settings.
abort.token_revoked: Your Home Assistant access token has been revoked. Please remove the integration and add it again.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to MCONNECT servers. Please check your internet connection.

auth_failed.message: Authentication with MCONNECT failed. Please re-authenticate.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to MCONNECT servers. Please check your internet connection.

access_denied.message: You do not have access to this home at this time. Access may be restricted to certain hours or days.
